dataset_info.name: Tools
dataset_info.description: Open-source tools and technologies supporting regenerative development and systemic change.

records.name: Logseq
records.description: A privacy-first, open-source knowledge base that works on top of local plain-text Markdown and Org-mode files. Ideal for building personal knowledge gardens and collaborative research.

records.name: Syncthing
records.description: A continuous file synchronization program that securely syncs files between two or more devices in real-time without a central server. Perfect for decentralized collaboration.

records.name: Nextcloud
records.description: A self-hosted, open-source cloud productivity platform providing file sync, collaboration, and communication tools. Enables community-controlled data infrastructure.

records.name: Bitwarden
records.description: A popular, open-source password management solution that syncs across all devices via the cloud or self-hosting. Essential for organizational security practices.

records.name: Jitsi Meet
records.description: A set of open-source projects that allows you to easily build and deploy secure video conferencing solutions without requiring accounts. Perfect for community organizing.

records.name: Matrix Protocol
records.description: An open standard and protocol for secure, decentralized, real-time communication and chat. Enables community-owned messaging infrastructure.

records.name: CryptPad
records.description: A private-by-design, end-to-end encrypted alternative to popular office tools and collaborative cloud services. Supports collaborative document editing without data exposure.
